title: Governance Reform
shortSummary: Reform the system from within — constitutional change, electoral reform, anti-corruption measures, Indigenous recognition, and modernising democratic institutions for the 21st century.
whyItMatters: The institutions of democracy need maintenance and renewal. Politicians who understand governance reform can improve the system itself — not just win within it. From anti-corruption bodies to constitutional recognition, reform is the legacy that outlasts any government.
coreConcepts: Electoral reform: voting systems and representation
